movie.title: Sri Sri Sri Raja Vaaru (2025) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & Telugu] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Two political party workers from Atreyapuram face tragedy when one’s pregnant wife goes into labor during floods. Unable to reach hospital, they get a midwife, but the baby is stillborn and the mother’s health declines.
